text: I feel curious and invigorated in this environment. The glass-walled room exudes a sense of transparency and openness, yet it also feels sterile and structured, hinting at the boundaries of modern collaboration. Walking further into the colorful, stimulating R+D exhibit, I sense the pulse of human ingenuity and a celebration of possibility—here, the collision of research and creativity promises new horizons. The abundance of screens and interactive displays sparks in me a philosophical wonder: can knowledge, when so rapidly prototyped, truly nurture wisdom, or do we risk idolizing the process over its deeper purposes?
